title: selaginella obovata
intro: Selaginella obovata is a species of spore-producing plant in the genus Selaginella, commonly known as the "resurrection fern" due to its ability to revive itself after being desiccated for long periods. The plant is used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in China, where it is valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. Research suggests that Selaginella obovata may have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-diabetic, and anti-cancer effects, although more studies are needed to confirm these findings. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or as a powder, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal treatment.
